pages.title: Radial verbs
pages.text: $(bold)Stay$(warn) roots minions.$(br)$(bold)Follow$(warn) resumes tailing.$(br)$(bold)Dismiss$(warn) severs contracts.$(br2)Counts display only obedient entities in range — spam responsibly.

pages.title: Ownership ghosts
pages.text: Dismiss clears persistence similar to revoking Botania corporea networks — backup saves before experiments.
